arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Norway manager provides Martin Odegaard update
arts.sum: Stale Solbakken reveals that Arsenal's Martin Odegaard is still some way away from making a return after leaving him out of the upcoming Norway squad.

arts.ttl: Arsenal leading charge for biggest transfer battle of 2025
arts.sum: Arsenal have enquired about Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, but he is also being chased by the rest of Europe's elite, according to a report. Reis penned a new contract until 2028 in the summer, so Palmeiras are under no pressure to sell.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs PSG on TV for free in tonight's Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome French champions Paris Saint Germain to the Emirates on Tuesday night in Champions League action

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSG - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta's side look for first win in new format plus the latest from Slovan Bratislava vs Man City
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Arsenal host PSG and Manchester City travel to Slovan Bratislava in Champions League action.

arts.ttl: 'Looks like a new player': Ian Wright says Tottenham have 'unearthed' a player who is like Kai Havertz
arts.sum: Tottenham produced a statement victory by outclassing an out-of-sorts Manchester United side at Old Trafford on Sunday. Even with his Arsenal glasses on, Ian Wright...

arts.ttl: ANSA: Milan Prosecutors Set to Question Inzaghi, Zanetti, Skriniar, and Calabria in Ultras Investigation
arts.sum: In a significant development in the ongoing investigation into violence and intimidation by Inter and AC Milan ultras, Milan prosecutors are preparing to interview key figures from both clubs. According to reports from Italian news agency ANSA, Inter coach Simone Inzaghi, Inter vice-president Javier Zanetti, former Inter defender Milan Skriniar (now with PSG), and AC Milan captain Davide Calabria may soon be called in as persons informed about the facts. Prosecutors Storari and Ombra, leading the investigation conducted by the Police and Guardia di Finanza, are set to begin a series of witness hearings. arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen declares he is worth over €100MILLION - as the former Chelsea and Arsenal target insists 'there are few players in the world like me'
arts.sum: After joining Napoli from Lille in 2020, the 25-year-old established himself as one of the most prolific strikers in world football at the Stadio Diego Armando Maradona.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSG LIVE: Champions League team news, line-ups and more tonight
arts.sum: The Gunners are looking to pick up their first win of the new European campaign after a draw against Atalanta two weeks ago

arts.ttl: Arsenal told perfect Martin Odegaard replacement as Mikel Arteta given bold PSG instruction
arts.sum: So, with the Gunners in need of a creative spark in the middle of the park, Keown has tipped youngster, Nwaneri, to start against PSG tonight - in a game which will be show live on Amazon Prime Video. Arsenal will lock horns with the French giants at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night, knowing a win could be crucial in the quest for qualification from the new-look Champions League group phase.

arts.ttl: Michael Oliver's refereeing record in Arsenal and Man City games as Premier League make decision
arts.sum: Michael Oliver took plenty of flack following his performance during Manchester City's 2-2 draw with Arsenal last month, with both sets of supporters convinced they'd be hard done by
